title: Sh@miyda` #8061
definition:
Shemida = "wise"

 1) a son of Gilead, grandson of Manasseh, and progenitor of a family
    in Manasseh
nasbUsage:
Definition: Shemida = "wise"

 1) a son of Gilead, grandson of Manasseh, and progenitor of a family
    in Manasseh

    NASB:  name of knowing, a man of Manasseh
